name: TATY Operation Joystick
short: TATY Operation Joystick for lifting equipment control replacement, fleet maintenance and spare-parts supply programs.
summary: Joystick control products are organized for buyers who need replacement control handles, equipment maintenance support and export-ready spare-parts supply. Pillarlift can help match parts by model photos, interface requirements and fleet service needs.

specs.Compatibility: Aerial work platforms, cranes and lifting equipment controls
specs.Interface support: Custom interface matching can be checked before quotation
specs.Inquiry support: Model matching, photos, packing and worldwide shipping

features: Control handle option for lifting equipment maintenance and repair
Interface and wiring details can be checked before quotation
Suitable for rental fleets, service teams, dealers and parts distributors
Export packing and combined spare-parts shipment support available
